mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_mini_subscribe(user_id, template_key, accepted, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{templateKey}, #{accepted}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE accepted = VALUES(accepted), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, template_key AS templateKey, accepted, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_mini_subscribe WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY template_key
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, template_key AS templateKey, accepted, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_mini_subscribe WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND template_key = #{templateKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notify_delivery_log(notification_id, recipient_user_id, channel, template_key, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{recipientUserId}, #{channel}, #{templateKey}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notify_delivery_log SET status = 'SUCCESS', provider_msg_id = #{providerMsgId}, error_code = NULL, error_msg = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_notify_delivery_log SET status = 'FAILED', error_code = #{errorCode}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
